pattern: Closing each shipment at the earliest parcel that dips below the running maximum is a greedy that provably leaves the most room for future shipments.
hints: A shipment becomes valid the moment its last parcel is lighter than something earlier in it; waiting longer only wastes parcels.
Scan left to right tracking the maximum of the currently open shipment.
When the current parcel is strictly below that running max, count a shipment and reset the running max from the next parcel.

edge_inputs.description: reset matters, a tall parcel after a close

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(2, min(size, 1500))
    weight = [rng.randrange(1, 10) for _ in range(n)]
    return [weight]
stress.note: small range to create equal and descending runs
